title: katherinea zebrina
intro: Katherinea zebrina, also known as the zebra plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. It is a woody vine native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, known for its distinctive zebra-like markings on its stem. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Katherinea zebrina can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which have been reported to provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health.
